api::domain-transfer-page.domain-transfe.whyRegisterTitle: Why is ICSDC the Right Place to Register Your Domain?
api::domain-transfer-page.domain-transfe.whyRegisterSubtitle: From setup to long-term management, ICSDC makes domain ownership simple and secure.

whyRegisterCards.title: Fast Activation Without Complications
whyRegisterCards.desc: Your domain goes live quickly so you can start building your website or email setup without waiting.

whyRegisterCards.title: Easy and Complete DNS Management
whyRegisterCards.desc: Manage DNS records, redirects, and configurations easily through a clean control panel.

whyRegisterCards.title: Honest Pricing With No Hidden Charges
whyRegisterCards.desc: Transparent registration and renewal prices — no surprise fees or sudden cost jumps.

highlightCards.description: Domains often expose your personal details on public databases like RDAP, but ICSDC keeps your information private at no extra cost. Your identity stays protected from spam, data collectors, and unwanted third-party access.

highlightCards.title: Transfer Your Existing Domain to ICSDC
highlightCards.description: Already have a domain? Move it to ICSDC quickly and safely. The transfer is smooth, requires just a few steps, and comes with zero downtime — so your website and emails stay uninterrupted.

api::domain-transfer-page.domain-transfe.tipsTitle: Smart Tips Before Choosing Your Domain Name
api::domain-transfer-page.domain-transfe.tipsSubtitle: Follow these simple guidelines to pick a domain that works for your brand.

tips.title: Choose a Short, Clean Name
tips.description: Short domains are easier to remember, type, and share. Aim for a simple name that users can recall instantly.

tips.title: Keep It Simple and Clear
tips.description: Avoid hyphens, numbers, and complicated words. The easier it is to spell, the easier it is to find.

tips.title: Build Your Brand into the Domain
tips.description: Try adding your brand name or a relevant keyword. This helps people recognize your business and improves visibility.

tips.title: Check for Availability & Trademarks
tips.description: Always verify that your domain isn't already taken or trademarked. This saves you from legal risks later.

tips.title: Consider Local Extensions
tips.description: If the .com version isn't available, think about regional extensions like .in, .uk, or .us. They're credible and often more accessible.

tips.title: Don't Wait Too Long
tips.description: Good domain names get registered fast. If you find one that fits your brand — secure it before someone else does.

faq.question: How long does a domain transfer to ICSDC take?
faq.answer: Most domain transfers complete within 5–7 days depending on your current registrar. ICSDC ensures the process is as smooth and quick as possible with real-time status updates.

faq.question: Will my website or email go down during the transfer?
faq.answer: No. ICSDC's zero-downtime transfer process ensures your website, email, and DNS services remain fully active throughout the entire transfer period.

faq.question: What do I need to start a domain transfer?
faq.answer: You need your domain's EPP/Authorization code (also called Auth code or transfer key) from your current registrar, and your domain must be unlocked and not in a 60-day transfer lock.

faq.question: Is there a cost to transfer my domain to ICSDC?
faq.answer: Domain transfer pricing is transparent and depends on your TLD (.com, .in, .net, etc.). Most transfers include a free 1-year extension. Contact us for exact pricing.

faq.question: Does ICSDC offer free privacy protection for my domain?
faq.answer: Yes. ICSDC includes free WHOIS privacy protection for eligible domains, keeping your personal information hidden from public databases at no extra cost.

faq.question: Can I transfer multiple domains at once?
faq.answer: Yes. ICSDC supports bulk domain transfers. Contact our support team to handle multiple domain migrations efficiently with dedicated assistance.
